hero.title: New to leadership? You don't have to figure it out alone.
hero.subtitle: Ment2Lead gives aspiring and new leaders the guidance, community, and self-awareness tools they need to grow with confidence.

problems.title: New leaders often struggle with three things
problems.description: Leadership looks simple from the outside, but the reality is far more complex once you’re responsible for people, decisions, and outcomes.

items.title: Nobody taught me how to lead
items.description: You were promoted because you were great at your job — not because you were trained to manage people, navigate conflict, or inspire a team.

items.title: Leadership feels lonely
items.description: Some challenges are difficult to discuss with your manager, your team, or even your friends. You need peers who truly understand the journey.

items.title: Lack of a feedback
items.description: Without structured feedback and guidance, leadership growth becomes guesswork instead of intentional development.

problems.conclusion: Ment2Lead gives aspiring and new leaders the guidance, community, and self-awareness tools they need to grow with confidence.

solutions.title: Four pillars of modern leadership growth
solutions.description: Ment2Lead builds leadership through structured mentorship, peer support, continuous learning, and self-reflection.

items.title: Curated Mentorship
items.description: Learn from experienced leaders who have already navigated similar challenges.

items.title: Peer Community
items.description: Connect with other leaders to share experiences and learn collaboratively.

items.title: Continuous Learning
items.description: Access practical insights and leadership resources tailored to your current growth areas.

items.title: Self-Discovery
items.description: Understand your leadership style, strengths, and development path.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Everything you need to support real leadership growth. A practical toolkit that connects people, knowledge, and guidance into one ecosystem.

items.title: Communication Tools
items.description: Stay connected with mentors and mentees through built-in messaging, video calls, and session scheduling.

items.title: Knowledge Base
items.description: Access curated resources, playbooks, and templates to accelerate your leadership development journey.

items.title: Smart Matching
items.description: Get paired with the right mentor based on your goals, industry, and leadership style preferences.

form.title: Request Early Access
form.name: Name
form.success: Thank you! Your spot has been secured.
